$comment: Expected canonical post-migration state for docs/save_compat/manifest.json's c3-typed-reference-v1-minimal fixture (issue #766/#764). Proves the ALREADY-EXISTING per-component v1->v2 raw-to-typed-reference dispatch (World.Save.Component.Entities' craftBillsCodec/powerNodesCodec/unitSimCodec ccInputVers=[1,2]) without any new migration code -- this fixture goes through the ORDINARY modern registry-driven decode path (isMigratedLegacyBaseline=false), just with three components encoded at their historical v1 (bare-id) shape. Real content definitions (cargo_hold_S/acolyte/forge_steel_dagger) so the real-engine fresh-process migration probe can load it too, not just the pure hspec decode path. Cross-checked by Test.Headless.World.Save.Compat's manifest-driven gate, which ALSO re-encodes the migrated snapshot and fresh-decodes it (asserting full structural equality), AND (round-3 review) checks each entity's OWN field values below by id -- not just the aggregate counts -- so a v1->v2 migration that maps a valid reference to the WRONG typed target (e.g. swapping station/claimant) would be caught even though it would still re-encode/decode self-consistently.
